text: Here, in the open, modern space, I feel a peculiar blend of anticipation and vulnerability. The environment is both inviting and unfamiliar, minimalist yet charged with possibility. The presence of bean bags suggests comfort, yet the sterile white and subdued lighting instill a sense of detachment. Transitioning into the second scene, the bold R+D wall and digital displays immerse me in thoughts of innovation and coexistence with technology. I am confronted by the desire to belong, to understand and be understood amidst rapid change and unfamiliarity. My awareness is heightened, oscillating between curiosity and an uneasy yearning for connection in this curated environment.
